concerns.text: The specification imposes a Phase 1 limitation that conclusions are restricted to validated crossing numbers ≤10 (see Assumptions paragraph beginning “Phase 1 Scope Boundary”). The original idea’s research question targets the complete census of hyperbolic prime knots with ≤13 crossings. This redefines the research question, narrowing the scope without justification from the idea.

FR‑008 mandates exponential‑backoff retry logic for Knot Atlas download failures. The original idea never specified such robustness measures; they add implementation work beyond the idea’s stated requirements.
